creator: s.moeding@ndh.net
text:
Hi!

I've created a port for the jargon file which is available in
info format on the net.  I tried to be extra careful with the
install-info bits, so I think it should install ok.

Because of its small size I've included the port below.  Feel
free to contact me if you encounter any problems.

Stefan
